case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. SUZIE GEE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE+, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED JUL-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, SUZIE ,AN INDIVIDUAL
